items.title: Death toll from Venezuela's earthquakes rises to 3,342
items.desc: The death toll from Venezuela's twin quakes has risen to ‌3,342, according to numbers released by the Venezuelan information ministry ​on Sunday. The new ​tally also puts the number of injured ​at 16,470, while the number of ‌homeless has risen to 17,345.
